title: Lawful Processing of Personal Data
description: Personal data may only be processed for a lawful purpose for which the data principal has given consent or which is specified in law.

title: Data Minimization
description: A data fiduciary shall collect only such personal data that is necessary for the specified purpose.

title: Data Erasure / Retention
description: Personal data must be erased once the purpose for which it was collected is fulfilled.

title: Processing Children's Data
description: Verifiable parental consent required before processing personal data of children under 18.

title: Breach Notification
description: Mandatory notification to the Data Protection Board and affected data principals in the event of a breach.
